title: Legal & Recovery
description: Generate a complaint, file an e-Zero FIR, track a bank dispute through to Ombudsman escalation, and follow an asset-recovery hold.

complaint.heading: Complaint assistant
complaint.description: Generate a ready-to-file NCRP complaint and/or bank dispute email.

ezeroFir.heading: e-Zero FIR
ezeroFir.description: Generate an e-Zero FIR scaffold (BNSS Sec 457) for electronic submission.

dispute.heading: Bank dispute tracking
dispute.description: Track a bank dispute against its RBI-mandated resolution window, and escalate to the Banking Ombudsman if it's overdue.

assetTracker.heading: Asset-recovery tracker
assetTracker.description: Create or look up a frozen-funds hold tied to a case.
